message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.frombuffer passthrough wrapper (br-franken_numpy-b5ls)

Expose fnp_python.frombuffer delegating to
numpy.frombuffer(buffer, dtype=float, count=-1, offset=0, *, like=None).
Parity oracle test covers:
- bytes buffer with explicit int32 dtype (default count=-1, offset=0)
- bytearray buffer input surface parity
- count-limited read returning first N elements
- nonzero byte offset skipping leading elements
- float64 dtype with negative and exact-representable floats
- WRITEABLE flag parity on bytearray buffer view
- buffer-too-short ValueError surface parity
